role: This directory constitutes the command-line interface layer of the ArchSpine semantic mirror system, responsible for routing user commands, rendering help and banners, and managing initialization and repository artifact strategies.
responsibility: Collectively, the components in this directory handle all user-facing CLI interactions: parsing command-line arguments, routing to appropriate subcommands (init, sync, build, publish, etc.), displaying formatted help text and system banners, managing initialization workflows (configuration bootstrapping, LLM credential setup, language discovery, git hooks), and coordinating repository artifact strategy checks and application through console feedback.

children.role: CLI UI presentation utility for formatting language discovery results, conditional banner rendering, and configuration value parsing.
CLI command adapters for ArchSpine operations.
Configuration module defining types and constants for document language selection in multilingual documentation tiers.
CLI help text renderer for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
Primary CLI entrypoint and command router for the ArchSpine semantic mirror system.
This directory contains the initialization and bootstrapping subsystem for the ArchSpine project.
CLI command adapter for managing repository artifact strategies.
